name: Triple Espresso Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease the bottom only of a 13x9-inch pan.
3. In a large bowl, combine all brownie ingredients and beat until well blended.
4. Spread batter evenly in the greased pan.
5. Bake for 30 minutes or until lightly golden.
6. Meanwhile, melt chocolate chips with butter in a small saucepan over low heat.
7. Stir in espresso granules and enough milk to achieve a drizzling consistency.
8. Drizzle the glaze over warm brownies.
9. Allow brownies to cool completely before cutting into bars.
